title: GitHub responsible AI
summary: Strengthen your AI knowledge through courses covering essential topics such as machine learning, facial recognition, generative AI, and responsible AI practices. Learn how AI tools detect and analyze faces, explore the creation of content with generative models, and embrace responsible considerations in AI development. These foundational classes build expertise in AI while focusing on responsible technology use.

sections.title: GitHub responsible AI
sections.summary: Strengthen your AI knowledge through courses covering essential topics such as machine learning, facial recognition, generative AI, and responsible AI practices. Learn how AI tools detect and analyze faces, explore the creation of content with generative models, and embrace responsible considerations in AI development. These foundational classes build expertise in AI while focusing on responsible technology use.

lessons.title: Introduction to AI concepts
lessons.content_md:
Curious about artificial intelligence? Want to understand what the buzz is about? This module introduces you to the world of AI.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/get-started-ai-fundamentals/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Introduction to generative AI and agents
lessons.content_md:
Ever wondered how AI can create content, answer questions, and assist with tasks? This module introduces you to the world of generative AI and agents.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/fundamentals-generative-ai/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Introduction to generative AI and agents

lessons.title: Embrace responsible AI principles and practices
lessons.content_md:
Explore six principles to guide AI development and use - fairness, reliability and safety, privacy and security, inclusiveness, transparency, and accountability.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/embrace-responsible-ai-principles-practices/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Embrace responsible AI principles and practices

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica GitHub responsible AI
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **GitHub responsible AI**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
